results.title: They’re uninsured after Obamacare became too costly. And they’re far from alone
results.description: In North Carolina, individual ACA sign-ups for 2026 were down 22% compared with the year before, a greater drop than any other state.

results.title: Cornwall, P.E.I., getting 80 long-term care beds
results.description: Cornwall, P.E.I., is getting 80 new private long-term care beds after the provincial government announced The Mount Continuing Care Community has been awarded the contract to build a facility. results.title: Maple farm invites public to Dairy Day
results.description: Get in touch with where your milk comes from by visiting the TePeol dairy farm on Saturday.

results.title: NOAA Confirms El Niño Has Begun and Is Strengthening, Bringing Global Weather Impacts
results.description: NOAA confirms El Niño is strengthening in the Pacific, with warming seas, Kelvin waves, and shifting global weather patterns tracked by NASA satellites.

results.title: Reports emerge of mass round-ups of men in Russia's Penza Oblast for deployment to war in Ukraine

results.title: Bengaluru Man's Message To Specially-Abled Zomato Delivery Agent Touches Hearts Online (WATCH VIRAL VIDEO)
results.description: A viral video from Bengaluru captures a man's heartwarming interaction with a specially-abled Zomato delivery person. The man, Sai Harsha, praised the rider's inspiring work and offered a small tip, a gesture that has since been widely appreciated online for its show of respect and gratitude.

results.title: Neurologist lists 5 must-follow rules for people with epilepsy to reduce risk of complications
results.description: The seizures associated with epilepsy can be a danger to the patient as well as the people around them in some cases. Dr Chawla explains how to lower risk.

results.title: Where MAHA’s war on synthetic food dyes stands as Nestlé finishes changes
results.description: In April 2025, the FDA launched an initiative to phase out petroleum-based food dyes, known as Food, Drug and Cosmetic dyes.

results.description: Discover the advantages and disadvantages of Vertical Alignment (VA) panels in affordable TVs, and learn how to make the most of your budget TV purchase.

results.title: Bitcoin Q3 Bottom Could Spark 'Complete Disbelief' Above $50,000
results.description: Bitcoin may end its macro downtrend with a bottom above $50,000 in a classic liquidity grab, a new prediction suggests as 'aggressive' shorting returns to Binance.

results.title: The Power of the First Frame: How Grand Opening Shots Shape Cinema
results.description: This article explores how the opening shot of a film serves as a cornerstone for storytelling, examining iconic examples from the twentieth century that demonstrate the lasting impact of visual introductions on audience expectations and narrative depth

results.title: Iran to launch complaint to FIFA over US World Cup treatment

results.title: 'A completely different story': 300 million-year-old fossils reveal the first vertebrate land dwellers weren't what we thought, researchers claim
results.description: Our ancient four-legged ancestors didn't have an amphibian-like life cycle when they began walking on land, according to a new study of rare fossils found near Chicago.

results.title: Mayor accused of faking her kidnapping in $2 million embezzlement scheme in Mexico
results.description: Nancy Napoles denied the accusation and said she was willing to cooperate with authorities to clarify what happened.

results.title: What's open and closed on Juneteenth 2026? Find out if banks, USPS and stores are operating.
results.description: Juneteenth will affect banking, mail service and financial markets, although retailers and restaurants are largely staying open.

results.title: National Science Foundation Pauses Plans to Dismantle Ocean Monitoring Equipment Off Oregon Coast
results.description: The National Science Foundation has paused plans to dismantle key ocean monitoring equipment off the Oregon coast following pressure from an Oregon congressmember and state lawmakers who argued the network is critical to coastal safety, fisheries, and weather forecasting.

results.title: Spider-Man: Web of Shadows Returns Through Fan-Made PC Remaster
results.description: A classic 2008 Spider-Man game, Spider-Man: Web of Shadows, has been restored and re-released as an enhanced PC version via emulation, offering HD graphics and high frame rates after years of being unavailable.

results.title: Estrogen levels in both the male and female brain may shape memory's resilience in face of stress
results.description: Traumatic experiences can cause memory problems, and estrogen may be a key factor that shapes the brain's resilience against such stressors, a mouse study finds.
